package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_io_operations_stat_before_open_without_branch: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: I/O operations. Flag os.Stat checks immediately followed by open/read operations without using the stat result meaningfully.
type CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranch(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranchDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_io_operations"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "io": 3, "operations": 4, "stat": 5, "before": 6}
    perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    io_negative_2 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["io"] + len(input)
    _ = io_negative_2
    operations_negative_3 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["operations"] + len(input)
    _ = operations_negative_3
    stat_negative_4 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["stat"] + len(input)
    _ = stat_negative_4
    before_negative_5 := perf_layer_io_operations_stat_negative["before"] + len(input)
    _ = before_negative_5
    return nil
}
